recommendations.title: Electroma
recommendations.overview: Two robots embark on a quest to become human.

recommendations.title: In a Heartbeat
recommendations.overview: A closeted boy runs the risk of being outed by his own heart after it pops out of his chest to chase down the boy of his dreams.

recommendations.title: Robot Overlords
recommendations.overview: Earth has been conquered by robots from another galaxy and the human survivors must stay in their homes, or risk incineration.

recommendations.title: Return
recommendations.overview: Polish animator Anna Błaszczyk’s humorous short—a collage of drawing, cut-out, and computer animation—was inspired by Stanisław Lem’s 1961 novel Return from the Stars, a time-paradox tale of an astronaut who returns to Earth after many years away.

recommendations.title: The Cathedral
recommendations.overview: Story of a pilgrim who comes to the Cathedral on the border of the known world. He wants to find answers. He finds tranquility.

recommendations.title: Inception: The Cobol Job
recommendations.overview: Cobb, Arthur and Nash are enlisted by Cobol Engineering.

recommendations.title: Patlabor: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A mysterious suicide and a series of unmanned robot run-aways sparks off a Police investigation into the suspicious software on-board thousands of industrial robots around Tokyo.

recommendations.title: Space Jam
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Comedy
recommendations.overview: With their freedom on the line, the Looney Tunes seek the help of NBA superstar Michael Jordan to win a basketball game against a team of moronic aliens.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: Solitary
recommendations.overview: A man wakes up inside a room to discover he's a prisoner sent into space to form Earth's first colony, and worse - his cell mate Alana is hell bent on destroying everything.
